heading: National Aviation Day
label: 118 National Aviation Day
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)11836:151., .May 11, 1939, ch. 12353 Stat. 739
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)11836:151., .May 11, 1939, ch. 12353 Stat. 739

children.text: designating August 19 as National Aviation Day;
calling on United States Government officials to display the flag of the United States on all Government buildings on National Aviation Day; and
inviting the people of the United States to observe National Aviation Day with appropriate exercises to further stimulate interest in aviation in the United States.
